subject: Fwd: FW: Liquid Funding Holdings Written Consent of Members and Management Co...
body:
Harry tells me that we invested an aggregate of $3.7 MM as follows:
 
11/9/01    $1.2 MM
 2/7/04     $  .8 MM
10/2704    $  .7 MM
 5/12/05    $1.0 MM
 
and that we must sign the resolutions authorizing the dissolution, so that  
we can receive on Friday a distribution of $6.5 MM.
 
An additional distribution will be made sometime thereafter.  Harry  believes 
that the additional distribution will be for approximately a few  hundred 
thousand dollars.
 
Please advise what additional info you require to determine whether or not  
to sign the resolutions.
 
 
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison  Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone:  212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 862-485-6315
e-mail:  dkiesq@aol.com


------------------------------

in this email. Each  taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's

From: "Schneider, Jerome (Exchange)" <JSchneider@Bear.com>
Subject: Re: FW: Liquid Funding Holdings Written Consent of Members and Management Com...
Date: Tue, 06 May 2008 15:25:09 GMT
To: DKIESQ@AOL.COM

That is actually correct and was sent erroneously to several investors.  Apologies.  However, our intentions to windown the business and make distributions remains consistent with our message in the past few investor calls and letters. If either Jeffrey or yourself would like to have a further conversation, please let me know. 
Regards,
Jerome
